docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-27-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1995, OFF CALENDAR

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OBOLU, SOLOMON AS TO DEFENDANT AIDAN, TINNELLY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-09-1995
